title: Fix MarkUS live update and delete persistence
description: Fix live comment delete realtime refresh and resolve/update persistence so comment state does not flash back after refresh.

affected_files.reason: live PATCH/DELETE client behavior and realtime refresh handling
browser regression coverage for live delete and resolve persistence
PocketBase public API update/delete persistence if needed
patch release version bump if fixed
patch release lock metadata if fixed
allow PocketBase realtime subscribers to receive soft-delete update events for scoped review comments

agent_notes.author: agent
agent_notes.content: Resolve failed because the browser sent PATCH changes nested under changes while the PocketBase hook accepts top-level resolved/text fields. Soft-delete realtime failed because review_comments.listRule excluded deleted=true records, preventing authorized subscribers from receiving the delete update event that triggers a list refresh.

agent_notes.author: agent
agent_notes.content: Because review_comments.listRule must allow deleted=true records for PocketBase realtime soft-delete update events, the public delete hook now scrubs comment text, pageUrl, color, anchor, geometry, and clientId before marking the record deleted.

metadata.reason: allow PocketBase realtime subscribers to receive soft-delete update events for scoped review comments
